help.title: Media Manager Guide
help.description: Learn how to create, manage, and publish social media content

overview.title: Overview
overview.content: Media Manager streamlines your social media workflow with AI-powered content creation. Create drafts, generate professional images, get compliance checks, and publish directly to Facebook. The Strategy tab lets you plan content calendars with automated scheduling.

workflow.title: The Content Workflow
steps: Set Topic
AI Research
Write Draft
Generate Image
Approve
Publish

create.title: Creating Content
create.subtitle: AI-powered draft creation
create.intro: Use AI to research topics and generate engaging social media posts.
steps: Enter a topic related to your product or audience
Select goal, target audience, and language
Click 'Research' for AI topic insights
Click 'Write Draft' to generate post text
Click 'Full Workflow' to do research + write in one step
Edit the generated text to add your personal touch
create.proTip: Use 'Both' language option to create bilingual posts that reach English and Spanish audiences simultaneously.

images.title: Image Generation
images.subtitle: Create stunning visuals with AI
images.intro: Generate professional images that match your brand and content.
steps: Select an image style (Active Senior, Family Moment, etc.)
Click 'Generate AI Image' to create a realistic photo
Use 'Quick Brand' for text overlay graphics after running AI workflow
Upload your own images by clicking the image area
Preview the image before saving the draft
images.proTip: AI-generated images always include the SOS pendant for brand consistency. 'Active Senior' and 'Spanish Lifestyle' styles perform best on Facebook.

publishing.title: Approval & Publishing
publishing.subtitle: Review, approve, and post to Facebook
publishing.intro: Posts go through approval before publishing to ensure quality and compliance.
steps: Save your draft with 'Save Draft' button
Click 'Approve' to mark post as ready
AI checks for compliance issues (medical claims, etc.)
Approved posts appear in 'Ready to Publish' section
Click 'Publish' to post directly to Facebook
Failed posts can be retried after fixing issues
publishing.proTip: Always preview your post before publishing. The preview shows exactly how it will appear on Facebook.

strategy.title: Content Strategy
strategy.subtitle: Plan and automate your content calendar
strategy.intro: Set up goals, audiences, topics, and scheduling for automated content planning.
steps: Define Goals (Brand Awareness, Lead Generation, etc.)
Configure Target Audiences for each goal
Create Topics with cooldown periods to avoid repetition
Set Image Styles that match your brand identity
Use Content Planner to generate weekly/monthly schedules
Review and approve planned content before it goes live
strategy.proTip: Set 7-day cooldowns on topics to keep your content fresh and avoid overwhelming followers with the same themes.

analytics.title: Performance Tracking
analytics.subtitle: Monitor engagement and reach
analytics.intro: Track how your published content performs on Facebook.
metrics: Reactions: Likes, loves, and other emoji responses
Shares: Content virality and reach expansion
Impressions: Total views of your content
Published Posts: Track all your live content
analytics.proTip: Refresh metrics regularly to see real-time engagement. High-performing posts can be used as templates for future content.

quickActions.title: Quick Actions Reference
items: Research → Get AI insights on your topic
Write Draft → Generate post text from topic
Full Workflow → Research + Write in one click
Generate AI Image → Create realistic photo
Quick Brand → Add text overlay to image
Approve → Mark post as ready to publish

bestPractices.title: Best Practices
tips: Always include an image - posts with visuals get 2-3x more engagement
Use bilingual posts (Both) to maximize reach in Spain
Review AI-generated content before approving - add personal touches
Schedule posts during peak hours (9-11am, 7-9pm CET)
Monitor engagement metrics and replicate successful post formats

testPendant.question: How do I test my pendant?
testPendant.answer: Press and hold the SOS button for 3 seconds. Our team will answer and confirm your device is working correctly. We recommend testing your pendant once a month.

sosButton.question: What happens when I press the SOS button?
sosButton.answer: When you press and hold the SOS button for 3 seconds, an alert is sent to our 24/7 monitoring center. A trained operator will immediately speak to you through your pendant and coordinate any necessary assistance.

fallDetection.question: How does fall detection work?
fallDetection.answer: Your pendant contains sensors that can detect sudden movements consistent with a fall. If a fall is detected, an automatic alert is sent to our team. We'll call through your pendant to check on you, and if there's no response, we'll follow your emergency protocol.

geoFencing.question: What is geo-fencing?
geoFencing.answer: Geo-fencing creates a virtual boundary around a location (like your home). If you travel outside this boundary, an alert can be sent to designated contacts. This is useful for added peace of mind for you and your family.

updateMedical.question: How do I update my medical information?
updateMedical.answer: Go to the 'Medical Info' section in your dashboard. Click 'Request Update' and describe the changes you'd like to make. Our team will review and update your records within 24-48 hours.

addContacts.question: How do I add emergency contacts?
addContacts.answer: Go to 'Emergency Contacts' in your dashboard. You can add up to 3 emergency contacts. These are the people we'll call if we can't reach you during an emergency.

updatePayment.question: How do I update my payment method?
updatePayment.answer: Go to 'Subscription & Billing' in your dashboard. Click 'Update' next to your payment method to securely update your card details.

lostPendant.question: What if my pendant is lost or damaged?
lostPendant.answer: Contact us immediately! We can disable your old pendant and send you a replacement. There may be a replacement fee depending on the circumstances. Call us or use the contact form below.

upgradePlan.question: Can I upgrade from Single to Couple membership?
upgradePlan.answer: Yes! Contact our support team and we'll help you upgrade your membership. The prorated difference will be charged to your payment method on file.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Getting help has never been easier. Just three simple steps.
howItWorks.step1Desc: One press is all it takes to alert our call centre. The button is large and easy to press, even in an emergency.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Our bilingual team responds 24/7/365 to help. We'll speak to you through the pendant to assess the situation.
howItWorks.step3Desc: We coordinate with emergency services and your family. Your GPS location helps us send help directly to you.

features.title: Pendant Features
features.subtitle: The ICE Alarm pendant is packed with life-saving technology.

gps.title: GPS Location Tracking
gps.description: When you press the SOS button, your exact location is instantly sent to our call centre. No need to explain where you are - we already know and can send help directly to you.
gps.bullet1: Works anywhere in Spain with mobile coverage
gps.bullet2: Accurate to within a few meters
gps.bullet3: Location shared with emergency services when needed

voice.description: Speak directly with our team through the pendant's built-in speaker and microphone. No phone needed - just press and talk.

fall.bullet3: Peace of mind for you and your family

testimonials.quote1: ICE Alarm gave me back my independence. I feel safe knowing help is just one button press away.

testimonials.quote3: The peace of mind this gives our family is priceless. Mum can live independently knowing we'll be called if anything happens.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: How do I use the pendant?
faq.a1: Simply press and hold the SOS button for 3 seconds. Our call centre will answer and speak to you through the pendant.
faq.q2: Does it work everywhere in Spain?
faq.a2: Yes! The pendant works anywhere with mobile phone coverage across Spain.
faq.q3: What happens if I fall and can't press the button?
faq.a3: The pendant has automatic fall detection. If it detects a fall, it will alert our call centre even if you don't press the button.
faq.q4: Can I speak English with your call centre?
faq.a4: Absolutely! All our operators speak both English and Spanish fluently.
faq.q5: What if I don't want a pendant?
faq.a5: You can join with just a membership and use your phone to call us. However, you won't have GPS tracking, fall detection, or the SOS button features.
faq.q6: How long does the battery last?
faq.a6: Up to 5 days on standby. We monitor battery levels and will alert you when it needs charging.
faq.a7: No long-term contracts! You can cancel anytime. We offer monthly and annual billing options.

parties.title: CONTRACTING PARTIES
parties.content:
ICE Alarm España S.L., with registered office at Calle Principal 1, Albox, 04800 Almería, Spain, and CIF B24731531, represented by its legal administrator (hereinafter "THE COMPANY").

And the Partner, whose details are registered in our partner portal system at the time of signing this agreement (hereinafter "THE PARTNER").

definitions.title: DEFINITIONS
definitions.content:
Referral: A potential customer introduced to THE COMPANY by THE PARTNER through the designated referral system.

Commission: The payment due to THE PARTNER for successful referrals as defined in this agreement.

Converted Customer: A referral who has completed the subscription process and whose pendant device has been delivered.

object.title: OBJECT OF THE AGREEMENT
object.content: THE PARTNER agrees to promote and refer potential customers to THE COMPANY's personal emergency alarm services. THE COMPANY agrees to pay commissions for successful referrals in accordance with the terms of this agreement.

obligations.title: PARTNER OBLIGATIONS
obligations.content:
THE PARTNER agrees to:

• Promote THE COMPANY's services ethically and professionally
• Provide accurate and truthful information about the services
• Not make false claims or promises on behalf of THE COMPANY
• Respect the intellectual property rights of THE COMPANY
• Use only approved marketing materials
• Comply with all applicable Spanish laws and regulations
• Maintain confidentiality of business information
• Not engage in any activities that could damage THE COMPANY's reputation

commissions.title: COMMISSION STRUCTURE
commissions.content:
THE PARTNER shall receive a commission of €50 (fifty euros) gross for each successful referral. A referral is considered successful when:

• The referred customer completes the registration process
• The customer completes payment for their subscription
• The pendant device is delivered to the customer

Commissions enter a 7-day holding period after the triggering event, during which they may be cancelled if the order is refunded or cancelled.

payment.title: PAYMENT TERMS
payment.content: Commissions are processed monthly. After the 7-day holding period, approved commissions will be scheduled for payment. Payments are made via bank transfer to the IBAN provided by THE PARTNER. THE PARTNER is responsible for all applicable taxes on commission income. Minimum payout threshold: €50. THE COMPANY reserves the right to withhold payment if agreement is unsigned or there are compliance concerns.

intellectualProperty.title: INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY
intellectualProperty.content: All trademarks, logos, marketing materials, and intellectual property belong exclusively to THE COMPANY. THE PARTNER is granted a limited, non-exclusive license to use approved marketing materials solely for the purpose of promoting THE COMPANY's services. This license terminates immediately upon termination of this agreement.

confidentiality.title: CONFIDENTIALITY
confidentiality.content:
THE PARTNER agrees to maintain strict confidentiality regarding:

• Customer personal data and information
• THE COMPANY's business strategies and practices
• Commission structures and partner terms
• Any proprietary information shared during the partnership

This obligation survives the termination of this agreement.

dataProtection.title: DATA PROTECTION (GDPR/LOPD)
dataProtection.content:
Both parties agree to comply with Regulation (EU) 2016/679 (GDPR) and Spanish Organic Law 3/2018 on Personal Data Protection (LOPD-GDD). THE PARTNER shall:

• Only collect and process personal data with proper consent
• Not share referred customer data with third parties
• Report any data breaches immediately to THE COMPANY
• Delete personal data upon termination of this agreement

THE COMPANY acts as Data Controller for all customer data.

duration.title: DURATION
duration.content: This agreement is valid for an indefinite period from the date of electronic signature. Either party may terminate this agreement with 30 days written notice. THE COMPANY reserves the right to suspend or terminate the partnership immediately in case of breach of these terms.

termination.title: TERMINATION
termination.content:
This agreement may be terminated:

• By either party with 30 days written notice
• Immediately by THE COMPANY for breach of terms
• Immediately if THE PARTNER engages in fraudulent activity
• Immediately if THE PARTNER damages THE COMPANY's reputation

Upon termination, pending approved commissions will be paid. Pending referrals in progress at termination may still be eligible for commission if converted within 30 days.

liability.title: LIABILITY
liability.content: THE PARTNER operates as an independent contractor, not an employee of THE COMPANY. THE PARTNER is solely responsible for their own tax obligations and social security contributions. THE COMPANY shall not be liable for any losses incurred by THE PARTNER in the course of their promotional activities. THE PARTNER indemnifies THE COMPANY against any claims arising from their promotional activities.

jurisdiction.title: JURISDICTION AND APPLICABLE LAW
jurisdiction.content: This agreement is governed by Spanish law. Any disputes arising from this agreement shall be submitted to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Almería, Spain. The parties waive any other jurisdiction that may correspond to them.

general.title: GENERAL PROVISIONS
general.content:
• This agreement constitutes the entire agreement between the parties
• Modifications must be made in writing and signed by both parties
• If any clause is deemed invalid, the remaining clauses remain in force
• Electronic signatures have the same legal validity as handwritten signatures under Spanish law
• THE COMPANY reserves the right to modify commission structures with 30 days notice

support.faqSubtitle: Find quick answers to common questions

faq.testPendant: How do I test my pendant?
faq.testPendantAnswer: Press and hold the SOS button for 3 seconds. Our team will answer and confirm your device is working correctly. We recommend testing your pendant once a month.
faq.sosButton: What happens when I press the SOS button?
faq.sosButtonAnswer: When you press and hold the SOS button for 3 seconds, an alert is sent to our 24/7 monitoring center. A trained operator will immediately speak to you through your pendant and coordinate any necessary assistance.
faq.fallDetectionAnswer: Your pendant contains sensors that can detect sudden movements consistent with a fall. If a fall is detected, an automatic alert is sent to our team. We'll call through your pendant to check on you, and if there's no response, we'll follow your emergency protocol.
faq.geoFencingAnswer: Geo-fencing creates a virtual boundary around a location (like your home). If you travel outside this boundary, an alert can be sent to designated contacts. This is useful for added peace of mind for you and your family.
faq.updateMedical: How do I update my medical information?
faq.updateMedicalAnswer: Go to 'Medical Info' in your dashboard and click 'Edit'. You can update your blood type, allergies, medications, conditions, and doctor information directly. Changes are saved immediately.
faq.addContacts: How do I add emergency contacts?
faq.addContactsAnswer: Go to 'Emergency Contacts' in your dashboard and click 'Add Contact'. You can add up to 3 emergency contacts with their name, phone, and relationship. You can also edit or delete contacts anytime.

help.title: AI Outreach Guide
help.subtitle: Master automated lead discovery and outreach campaigns

overview.title: What is AI Outreach?
overview.content: AI Outreach automates lead discovery and email campaigns for sales and partner acquisition. Import leads from any source, let AI score them for fit, research their business automatically, generate personalized emails, and convert qualified prospects into members or partners.

leads.title: Leads Tab
leads.intro: Manage raw leads before they enter your sales pipeline.
steps: Add leads manually or import via CSV/paste list
Select pipeline type: Sales or Partner
Optionally assign leads to a campaign
Click 'Rate All New' to let AI score leads 1-10
Leads scoring 7+ can be moved to CRM
leads.proTip: Import leads in batches and rate them together for efficient processing.

crm.title: CRM Tab
crm.intro: Work qualified leads through your pipeline with AI assistance.
steps: Leads appear in the 'New' column after qualification
Click 'Research Business' for AI-generated company insights
Click 'Generate Intro Email' for personalized outreach
Drag cards between columns to update status
Convert successful leads to Members or Partners
crm.proTip: Always research a business before generating the intro email for better personalization.

campaigns.title: Campaigns Tab
campaigns.intro: Create and manage automated email campaigns.
steps: Click 'New Campaign' to create a targeted campaign
Define the ideal lead profile for AI personalization
Configure email tone and outreach goals
Enable follow-up sequences for non-responders
Assign leads to campaigns for organized outreach
campaigns.proTip: Create separate campaigns for different regions or industries for better targeting.

inbox.title: Inbox Tab
steps: View all email threads in one unified inbox
AI automatically classifies replies by intent
Review AI-suggested responses before sending
Edit and personalize replies as needed
inbox.proTip: Respond to interested leads within 24 hours for best conversion rates.

analytics.title: Analytics Tab
metrics: Leads Discovered: Total leads imported into the system
Leads Qualified: Leads that passed AI rating and moved to CRM
Emails Sent: Total outreach emails dispatched
Replies Received: Number of responses received
Conversions: Successful member or partner signups

bestPractices.title: Best Practices
tips: Start with focused campaigns targeting specific regions or industries
Rate all new leads before moving to CRM for better qualification
Always review and personalize AI-generated emails before sending
Follow up within 3-5 days if no response
Document notes on each lead for better context and team collaboration

s3_1Items: GPS pendant devices for emergency alerts

Coordination with emergency services (112) when required

s4_2GpsItems: Requires battery charge (if battery dies, no alerts can be sent)
Requires mobile network coverage (may not work in remote areas or buildings with poor signal)
GPS accuracy varies (typically 5-50 meters, may be less accurate indoors)
Fall detection is not 100% accurate (may miss some falls or trigger false alerts)
Device must be worn to be effective
s4_2SystemsItems: Internet and phone networks can experience outages
Software systems can have bugs or failures
AI assistant may misunderstand or make errors

privacy.s1p1: ICE Alarm España ("we", "us", "our") operates the personal emergency response service available at icealarm.es.
privacy.s1p3: For any privacy-related questions, contact us at: privacy@icealarm.es
s2Items: Your rights under EU General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and Spanish Organic Law 3/2018 (LOPD-GDD)
s3EmergencyItems: Names, phone numbers, and email addresses of people you designate
s3PaymentItems: Payment card details (processed securely by Stripe, Inc.)
s3DeviceItems: Location data when alerts are triggered
s3CommsItems: Chat transcripts with our AI assistant
privacy.s3_3p1: Device Monitoring Partner (MonitorLinq B.V.): We receive real-time device status updates including location, battery level, SOS alerts, and fall detection events from your GPS pendant via our technology partner MonitorLinq B.V. (Netherlands).
privacy.s4Title: 4. Why We Collect Your Data (Legal Basis)
s4TableRows: Respond to SOS alerts and emergencies
Record calls for quality and training
privacy.s4SpecialCategory: Special Category Data (Health Information): We process your medical information ONLY because you have given us explicit consent during registration, AND because this information may be vital for protecting your life in an emergency situation (GDPR Article 9(2)(a) and (c)).
privacy.s5_1Intro: When your pendant detects an emergency (SOS button, fall detection, device offline), we:
s5_1Items: Receive the alert from our monitoring partner
Access your profile to identify you
Review your medical information and emergency contacts
Contact you by phone to assess the situation
privacy.s5_2p1: When speaking with Isabella, your conversation is processed using artificial intelligence. Human operators can take over at any time and will always handle genuine emergencies.
privacy.s6Title: 6. Who We Share Your Data With
privacy.s6Intro: We share your data ONLY with the following categories of recipients, and ONLY when necessary:
s6_1TableRows: EU data center, DPA in place
EU-US Data Privacy Framework, PCI-DSS compliant
privacy.s6_2Intro: In an emergency, we may share your name, location, and relevant medical information with:
s6_2Items: Local police, fire, or ambulance services
privacy.s6_2p1: This sharing is based on protecting your vital interests (GDPR Article 6(1)(d)).
privacy.s6_3Intro: People you designate as emergency contacts will receive:
s6_3Items: Notification when an alert is triggered
Your location at the time of alert
privacy.s6_4Intro: We may disclose your data if required by:
s6_4Items: Spanish law enforcement with valid legal basis
s6_5Items: Share your data for third-party marketing
Use your medical data for any purpose other than emergency response
privacy.s7Intro: Some of our service providers are located outside the European Economic Area (EEA). When we transfer your data outside the EEA, we ensure protection through:
s7Items: EU-US Data Privacy Framework (for certified US companies)
Standard Contractual Clauses approved by the European Commission
privacy.s7p1: You can request copies of the relevant safeguards by contacting us.
privacy.s8p1: After these periods, data is securely deleted or anonymized.
privacy.s9Intro: Under GDPR and Spanish law, you have the right to:
privacy.s9_1p1: Request a copy of all personal data we hold about you. We will respond within 30 days.
privacy.s9_2p1: Correct any inaccurate or incomplete data. You can update most information directly in your member dashboard.
privacy.s9_3p1: Request deletion of your data. Note: We may need to retain some data for legal compliance. You can request deletion through your member dashboard or by contacting us.
privacy.s9_4p1: Request that we limit how we use your data while a complaint is being resolved.
privacy.s9_5p1: Receive your data in a structured, machine-readable format.
privacy.s9_6p1: Object to processing based on legitimate interests. For direct marketing, you can opt out at any time.
privacy.s9_7p1: Where we rely on your consent, you can withdraw it at any time. This does not affect the lawfulness of processing before withdrawal.
privacy.s9Warning: Important: If you withdraw consent for medical data processing or request deletion, we may no longer be able to provide effective emergency response services. In such cases, we may need to terminate your membership for your own safety.
s9_8Items: Online: Through your member dashboard at icealarm.es/dashboard
privacy.s9_8p1: We will respond within 30 days. We may need to verify your identity before processing requests.
privacy.s10Intro: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures including:
privacy.s10p1: Our database is hosted in a Tier 3 certified data center in the European Union.
privacy.s11p1: Our services are not directed at children under 16. We do not knowingly collect personal data from children under 16 without parental consent. If you believe we have collected such data, please contact us immediately.
privacy.s12Intro: Our AI assistant may process your data to:
privacy.s12p1: You have the right to request human intervention in any automated decision that significantly affects you. During any emergency, human operators are always available to take over.
s13Items: Essential cookies: Required for the website to function
Analytics cookies: To understand how visitors use our site (only with consent)
privacy.s13p1: You can manage cookie preferences through our cookie banner or your browser settings.
privacy.s14Intro: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of significant changes by:
privacy.s14p1: The "Last Updated" date at the top indicates when the policy was last revised.
privacy.s15p1: If you are not satisfied with how we handle your data, you have the right to lodge a complaint with:
privacy.s15Authority:
Agencia Española de Protección de Datos (AEPD)
C/ Jorge Juan, 6
28001 Madrid
www.aepd.es
Tel: 900 293 183
privacy.s15p2: You also have the right to seek judicial remedy.
